user_query: I'm a basketball fan and I want to know the latest news and updates about the NBA. Can you give me the latest news articles and blog posts about basketball? Also, show me some images related to the NBA.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest news articles related to the NBA from various sports news sources.
Fetch the latest blog posts about basketball from selected blogs.
Retrieve a collection of images related to the NBA from an image database or API.
